zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas於1398年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，她的父親Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney25歲，母親Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney11歲。她於1425年與James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas在蘇格蘭阿吉爾奧陳布雷可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年2月8日之前在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭素斯 藍納可爾道格拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas于1398年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾时，她的父亲Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney25岁，母亲Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney11岁。她于1425年与James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas在苏格兰阿吉爾奧陳布雷可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年2月8日之前在英国苏格兰藍納可爾，埋葬在英国苏格兰素斯 藍納可爾道格拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas was born in 1398, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney, was 25 and her mother, Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, was 11. She married James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas in 1425, in Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 8 February 1463, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas est née en 1398, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas en 1425, à Auchenbreck, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 février 1463, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas 1398 in Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney 25 und ihre Mutter Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney 11. Sie hat 1425 in Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Februar 1463 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas è nata il nel 1398 nel Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas nel 1425, nel Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 8 febbraio 1463, nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglasが1398年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkneyは25歳，母Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkneyは11歳であった。1425年にスコットランドアルグイルアウチェンブレックでJames Douglas 7th Earl of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年2月8日以前にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアで死去し，イギリススコットランドソウス ラナルクシュアイアドウグラスにて埋葬された。

ko.After Battle Of Arkinholm: 핀란드 터르쿠 자 포리 a랜드 짓아 아홀름
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas(이)가 1398년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1425년 스컷랜드 아그이 오천브레c크에서 James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 2월 8일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 소우스 랜아르크실르 더글라스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas nasceu em 1398, em Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas em 1425, em Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de fevereiro de 1463, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas родилась в 1398 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas в 1425 г. в местности аучэнбрекк, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 8 февраль 1463 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности доуглас, соут ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Sinclair Countess of Douglas nació en 1398, en Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Henry Sinclair 2nd Earl of Orkney, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Egidia Jill Douglas Countess of Orkney, tenía 11 años. Se casó con James Douglas 7th Earl of Douglas en 1425, en Auchenbreck, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de febrero de 1463, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Douglas, South Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
